chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Blood Money for Wounds and Head Injuries

text: 5386 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ أَمِيرَ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَضَى فِي اَلْهَاشِمَةِ بِعَشْرٍ مِنَ اَلْإِبِلِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5386 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni: "Indeed, the Commander of the Faithful (as) ruled that for the hashimah (a wound that fractures the bone), the compensation is ten camels."
